notes.title: Bug investigation — login race
notes.content:
Repro

  1. Open app on Android 13+
  2. Lock vault
  3. Background the app for 30s
  4. Foreground

Expected

Vault stays locked, biometric prompt shows on tap.

Actual

Race condition: biometric callback fires twice when ambient light sensor toggles fast.

Fix sketch

const inflight = useRef(false);
const handle = useCallback(async () => {
  if (inflight.current) return;
  inflight.current = true;
  try { await unlock(); } finally { inflight.current = false; }
}, []);

notes.title: Architecture Decision — IndexedDB compaction
notes.content:
ADR-23

Status: Accepted

Context

The current implementation uses a single IndexedDB object store per data type, which forces a full re-read on every list refresh. As the vault grows past 5,000 items, this becomes the dominant cost on cold open.

Decision

Introduce a paginated read API backed by an indexed cursor, keyed by updatedAt DESC, id. Cache the first page in-memory at unlock and stream subsequent pages on scroll.

Consequences

  • + Lower TTI on cold open
  • + Memory bounded
  • − Existing list virtualization needs to switch from windowed to streaming mode
async function listPaged(store: string, limit = 50, cursor?: string) {
  // ...
}

Budget

Approx ₹22,000 per person, all-in.

notes.title: Recipe — Hyderabadi chicken biryani
notes.content:
Ingredients (serves 4)

  • 500g paneer
  • 2 cups basmati rice
  • 2 large onions, sliced thin
  • 1 cup yogurt
  • Whole spices: bay leaves, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves
  • Saffron + warm milk
  • Mint & coriander

Steps

  1. Marinate the protein in yogurt + ginger-garlic paste + chilli powder for 30 minutes.
  2. Fry the onions until deep brown — this is half the flavour.
  3. Cook rice 70% — it'll finish in dum.
  4. Layer rice + curry + fried onions + saffron milk.
  5. Seal with dough or foil. Dum on low heat for 25 minutes.

Tip: Resist opening the lid. Trust the process.

notes.title: Journal — Sat Aug 09 2025

notes.title: Recipe — South Indian filter coffee
notes.content:
Ingredients (serves 4)

  • 500g paneer
  • 2 cups basmati rice
  • 2 large onions, sliced thin
  • 1 cup yogurt
  • Whole spices: bay leaves, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves
  • Saffron + warm milk
  • Mint & coriander

Steps

  1. Marinate the protein in yogurt + ginger-garlic paste + chilli powder for 30 minutes.
  2. Fry the onions until deep brown — this is half the flavour.
  3. Cook rice 70% — it'll finish in dum.
  4. Layer rice + curry + fried onions + saffron milk.
  5. Seal with dough or foil. Dum on low heat for 25 minutes.

Tip: Resist opening the lid. Trust the process.

notes.content:
Ingredients (serves 4)

  • 500g paneer
  • 2 cups basmati rice
  • 2 large onions, sliced thin

  • Whole spices: bay leaves, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves

  1. Marinate the protein in yogurt + ginger-garlic paste + chilli powder for 30 minutes.
  2. Fry the onions until deep brown — this is half the flavour.
  3. Cook rice 70% — it'll finish in dum.
  4. Layer rice + curry + fried onions + saffron milk.
  5. Seal with dough or foil. Dum on low heat for 25 minutes.

Tip: Resist opening the lid. Trust the process.

notes.title: Project Vault Sync v2 — Plan
notes.content:
Goal

Ship a v1 of the feature that cuts unlock time by 50%.

Milestones

  1. Week 1–2: Discovery, wireframes, telemetry plan.
  2. Week 3–5: Backend + storage layer.
  3. Week 6–8: Mobile + web UIs.
  4. Week 9: Closed beta.
  5. Week 10: Public launch.

Open questions

  • Do we charge separately or bundle into Premium?
  • iOS vs Android first?

notes.title: Feature spec — Shared expense splits
notes.content:
Spec

User story

As a vault user, I want to have transactions automatically labelled so that I can save time and reduce manual data entry.

Requirements

  • Works offline
  • End-to-end encrypted in vault
  • Sub-100ms perceived latency

Out of scope

  • Real-time collaboration
  • Cross-vault sharing

notes.title: Recipe — Pav Bhaji
notes.content:
Pav Bhaji

Ingredients

  • Mixed vegetables
  • Pav bhaji masala
  • Onions, tomatoes, butter
  • Pav (bread rolls)

Steps

  1. Boil and mash vegetables.
  2. Cook masala with butter, onions, tomatoes.
  3. Mix in vegetables.
  4. Toast pav with butter.

Last cooked: Thu Dec 25 2025

notes.title: Recipe — Chicken Tikka
notes.content:
Chicken Tikka

Ingredients

  • 500g boneless chicken
  • Hung curd
  • Ginger-garlic paste
  • Red chilli, garam masala
  • Lemon juice

Steps

  1. Marinate chicken for 4 hours.
  2. Skewer, grill till charred edges.
  3. Brush with butter, serve with onions and lime.

Last cooked: Sun Nov 09 2025

notes.title: Recipe — Aloo Paratha
notes.content:
Aloo Paratha

Ingredients

  • 2 cups whole wheat flour
  • 3 boiled potatoes
  • Green chillies, coriander, ginger
  • Salt, garam masala
  • Ghee

Steps

  1. Make a soft dough.
  2. Mash potatoes, mix with spices.
  3. Stuff dough, roll gently.
  4. Cook on tawa with ghee.

Last cooked: Sat Feb 21 2026

notes.title: Recipe — Masala Chai
notes.content:
Masala Chai

Ingredients

  • 1 cup water
  • 1/2 cup milk
  • 2 tsp loose Assam tea
  • Crushed ginger, cardamom, cloves
  • Sugar to taste

Steps

  1. Boil water with whole spices.
  2. Add tea leaves, simmer 1 minute.
  3. Add milk, bring to boil.
  4. Strain into cups; serve hot.

Last cooked: Fri Jun 27 2025

notes.title: Recipe — Sambar
notes.content:
Sambar

Ingredients

  • Toor dal
  • Drumsticks, brinjal, tomato, pumpkin
  • Sambar powder
  • Tamarind pulp
  • Mustard, curry leaves

Steps

  1. Cook dal till mushy.
  2. Boil veggies with tamarind and sambar powder.
  3. Combine, temper with mustard and curry leaves.

Last cooked: Mon Jun 16 2025

notes.title: Research: best CDNs for India
notes.content:
Question

Should we move PBKDF2 to Argon2id?

Sources

  • OWASP password storage cheat sheet
  • Vercel Fluid Compute docs
  • Internal benchmark — May 2026

Tentative answer

Yes, but pin iteration count behind a feature flag for a month.

notes.title: Research: on-device ML for receipt OCR
notes.content:
Question

Should we move PBKDF2 to Argon2id?

Sources

  • OWASP password storage cheat sheet
  • Vercel Fluid Compute docs
  • Internal benchmark — May 2026

Tentative answer

CloudFront Asia is leading by ~40ms vs the rest.

Should we move PBKDF2 to Argon2id?
